title: PayFast API Vocabulary
description: Controlled vocabulary of key terms and concepts used in the PayFast payment gateway API.

terms.label: Merchant ID
terms.description: Unique numeric identifier assigned to a merchant by PayFast during registration.

terms.label: Merchant Key
terms.description: Secret key assigned to a merchant by PayFast, used alongside the merchant ID for payment form authentication.

terms.label: Passphrase
terms.description: Optional security passphrase set by the merchant in their PayFast account, used to salt the MD5 signature. Required for subscription payments.

terms.label: Signature
terms.description: MD5 hash of alphabetically sorted, URL-encoded payment parameters (optionally salted with the passphrase). Used to authenticate requests.

terms.label: Subscription / Tokenization Token
terms.description: UUID identifying a recurring billing subscription or tokenized card agreement. Returned in the ITN after the first payment and used for all subsequent API calls.

terms.label: Merchant Payment ID
terms.description: Merchant-assigned reference ID for a payment, up to 100 characters. Returned in the ITN for reconciliation.

terms.label: PayFast Payment ID
terms.description: PayFast internal unique identifier for a payment transaction.

terms.label: Gross Amount
terms.description: Total transaction amount paid by the buyer in ZAR, including PayFast fees.

terms.label: PayFast Fee
terms.description: PayFast processing fee deducted from the gross amount in ZAR.

terms.label: Net Amount
terms.description: Amount deposited into the merchant's PayFast account after fee deduction (amount_gross - amount_fee).

terms.label: Instant Transaction Notification
terms.description: Server-to-server webhook POST sent by PayFast to the merchant's notify_url upon payment completion, cancellation, or subscription events.

terms.label: Subscription Type
terms.description: Determines the type of recurring payment agreement: 1=recurring billing (fixed schedule), 2=tokenization (merchant-initiated adhoc charges).

terms.label: Billing Frequency
terms.description: Numeric code representing how often a recurring subscription is billed: 3=monthly, 4=quarterly, 5=biannually, 6=annually.

terms.label: Billing Cycles
terms.description: Number of times a subscription will be billed. 0 means indefinite billing until cancelled.

terms.label: Bank Account Type
terms.description: Type of bank account for refund disbursement: 'current' or 'savings'.

terms.label: Payment Method
terms.description: Code restricting which payment method the customer can use: cc=credit card, dc=debit card, ef=instant EFT, mp=Mobicred, sc=SCode, mc=MoreTyme.

terms.label: Onsite Payment UUID
terms.description: Unique identifier generated for an onsite (embedded) checkout session, passed to the PayFast JS library to render the payment widget.

terms.label: Sandbox / Test Mode
terms.description: Test environment at sandbox.payfast.co.za allowing merchants to simulate payments without real money. Refunds and onsite checkout are not available in sandbox mode.

terms.label: PCI-DSS Level 1
terms.description: Payment Card Industry Data Security Standard Level 1 certification held by PayFast, the highest level of compliance for payment processors.

terms.label: South African Rand
terms.description: The only currency currently supported by PayFast. All monetary amounts are expressed in ZAR.
